featureName: BUG-002: Stale `deploy/self-hosted/` references and policy-violating Master Plan

completedPhaseClaims.summary: Created planning bug packet for the second batch of deploy-doc drift discovered by the 2026-05-13 system review (stale `deploy/self-hosted/` paths in Deployment.md, comments in config/smackerel.yaml + scripts/commands/config.sh, the 427-line operator-coupled `Self_Hosted_Master_Deployment_Plan.md`, dev-leading `docs/Operations.md`, missing knb-overlay breadcrumb in Deployment.md, and stale Status text in spec 050).

Wrote design.md decisions D-001 (generic-only enforcement; per-target operator-coupled content lives in the knb deploy-adapter overlay), D-002 (sweep stale paths to adapter-contract form), D-003 (stub the Master Plan with a migration-pointer body of <80 lines), D-004 (insert generic Production Deploy subsection in Operations.md before First-Time Setup, then label First-Time Setup `(Local Dev)`), D-005 (add knb Deploy-Adapter Overlay Dependency subsection in Deployment.md naming spec `003-smackerel-self-hosted-adapter-readiness`), D-006 (refresh spec 050 Status to match state.json), D-007 (consumer impact sweep). Six scenarios SCN-032-D06..D11 mapped to T-DOC-009..017 plus regression T-DOC-R04..R06.

Wrote scopes.md: Scope 1 sweeps stale `deploy/self-hosted/` paths and stubs the Master Plan; Scope 2 reframes Operations.md, adds the knb breadcrumb to Deployment.md, refreshes spec 050 Status. Both scopes carry Use Cases (Gherkin), Implementation Files, Change Boundary, Consumer Impact Sweep, Test Plan, and DoD with embedded `[SCN-XXX: <full title>]` for G068 fidelity plus the required state-transition-guard phrasing.

Spec-review pass before implementation: spec.md, design.md, scopes.md confirmed coherent. Six Gherkin scenarios SCN-032-D06..D11 each map 1:1 to a scoped DoD line and a Test Plan row. Approved for implement phase.

Scope 1: reworded `docs/Deployment.md` references to `deploy/self-hosted/(apply|manifest)` and `cp -R deploy/self-hosted` to either adapter-contract form or `deploy/_example/target-skeleton`; updated `config/smackerel.yaml` line ~1031 comment and `scripts/commands/config.sh` line ~1413 comment to name the knb deploy-adapter overlay as the apply owner; replaced `docs/Self_Hosted_Master_Deployment_Plan.md` with a 73-line generic migration-pointer stub (was 427 lines). Scope 2: inserted a Production Deploy (Build-Once Deploy-Many) subsection in `docs/Operations.md` BEFORE First-Time Setup and relabeled First-Time Setup to `(Local Dev)`; inserted a `knb Deploy-Adapter Overlay Dependency` subsection in `docs/Deployment.md` naming the knb spec `003-smackerel-self-hosted-adapter-readiness`; refreshed `specs/050-ml-sidecar-health-isolation/spec.md` Status to `Resolved — implemented 2026-05-15`.

Static-doc test surface (T-DOC-009..017): executed scenario-first grep red→green probes per design.md §Test Design. All passed. No runtime tests invoked because zero runtime files modified (docs-only repair per change boundary).

Regression coverage: T-DOC-R04 (BUG-001 invariants for `Self_Hosted_Deployment_Plan.md` and Deployment.md sections), T-DOC-R05 (Generic Pre-Apply Prerequisites + Connector Live-Stack Evidence Caveat both still present), T-DOC-R06 (zero env-specific leak patterns introduced anywhere) all green.

Static-doc grep checks T-DOC-009..017 plus regression T-DOC-R04..R06 all pass: zero literal `deploy/self-hosted/(apply|manifest)` matches in Deployment.md or config files, Master Plan reduced to 73 lines with zero leak patterns, Operations.md leads with Production Deploy subsection, Deployment.md names knb spec, spec 050 Status text refreshed.

Verified `docs/Self_Hosted_Master_Deployment_Plan.md` reduced from 427 to 73 lines (migration-pointer stub only); zero env-specific tokens in any edited file; BUG-001 stub invariants preserved; D-001 generic-only constraint enforced.

Chaos surface: docs-only bug; chaos-test substitutes per design.md are the static-doc grep red→green probes which would re-detect any rollback to obsolete content. Verified zero source/runtime/CI/compose files modified via `git diff --name-only` against expected file set.
No simplification opportunities: the migration-pointer stub is already minimal; the new Operations.md and Deployment.md subsections are non-redundant with existing content.
No runtime instability surface for a docs-only repair; product runtime byte-identical to pre-bug HEAD.

Security review: removed a `***REMOVED***` password marker, real Linux user `selfhosted`, real Wi-Fi NIC name `wlp195s0`, real BIOS spec text, real subdomain pattern, and operator-coupled topology from the in-repo Master Plan. Pre-commit gitleaks/pii-scan verified clean. No secrets, real hostnames, IPs, or tailnet IDs introduced anywhere.

Updated bug spec.md status to Resolved; wrote report.md with execution evidence; added implementation acknowledgement to uservalidation.md; marked both scopes Done with per-DoD evidence; created scenario-manifest.json with 6 scenarios.

completedScopes: Scope 1: Sweep stale paths and stub the policy-violating Master Plan
Scope 2: Reframe Operations.md, add knb breadcrumb to Deployment.md, refresh spec 050 status
